EASTERN NORTH ATLANTIC.
DNC 01.
1. GUNNERY EXERCISES 061600Z TO 061900Z OCT
   IN AREA WITHIN FIVE MILES OF:
   A. 13-50.55N 021-31.98W.
   B. 14-07.85N 021-16.85W.
   C. 14-32.33N 021-43.79W.
   D. 14-14.03N 021-59.14W.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 3125/18.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 062000Z OCT 18.
